---
title: "PCA"
output: html_document
---

# SGDP whole-genome SNP panel

```{r setup}
library(data.table)
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(wesanderson)
library(showtext)

font_add_google("Lato", "lato")
showtext_auto()
```

```{r paths}
modern_file <- "~/Documents/GitHub/PAINT/data/sgdp.wg.pca.eigenvec"
ancient_file <- "~/Documents/GitHub/PAINT/data/ancient.projected.sscore"
metadata_file <- "~/Documents/GitHub/PAINT/data/modern_metadata.csv"
```

```{r process}
modern <- fread(modern_file, header = TRUE)
colnames(modern) <- c("IID", paste0("PC", 1:10))
metadata <- fread(metadata_file)

modern <- modern %>%
  left_join(metadata, by = c("IID"="library_id")) %>%
  mutate(Type = "Modern")

# ancient projections
ancient <- fread(ancient_file)

ancient_pcs <- ancient %>%
  select(IID, starts_with("PC")) %>%
  mutate(Type = "Ancient")

ancient_pcs <- ancient_pcs %>%
  mutate(
    Group = case_when(
      IID %in% c("Denisova3", "Denisova25") ~ "Denisovan",
      IID %in% c("Denisova11") ~ "Hybrid",
      TRUE ~ "Neanderthal"
    )
  )

# bind

modern_clean <- modern %>%
  select(IID, starts_with("PC"), Population_ID, Region) %>%
  mutate(Type = "Modern",
         Group = Population_ID)

ancient_clean <- ancient_pcs %>%
  rename_with(
    ~ gsub("_AVG", "", .x),
    starts_with("PC")
  ) %>%
  select(IID, Group, starts_with("PC")) %>%
  mutate(
    Population_ID = "Ancient",
    Region = "Ancient",
    Type = "Ancient"
  )

df <- bind_rows(modern_clean, ancient_clean)
```

```{r plot}
modern_pops <- sort(unique(df$Population[df$Type == "Modern"]))
modern_colors <- setNames(
  wes_cols[1:length(modern_pops)],
  modern_pops
)

ancient_colors <- c(
  "Neanderthal" = "red",  
  "Denisovan"   = "green",
  "Hybrid"      = "blue"
)

all_colors <- c(modern_colors, ancient_colors)

ggplot(df, aes(PC1, PC2)) +
  geom_point(
    aes(color = Group),
    size = 1.5,
    alpha = 0.5
  ) +
  geom_point(
    data = df %>% filter(Type == "Ancient"),
    aes(color = Group, alpha = 0.5),
    size = 3
  ) +
  scale_color_manual(values = all_colors) +
  theme_minimal(base_family = "lato", base_size = 14) +
  labs(
    title = "PCA Projection of Ancient and Modern Genomes",
    x = "PC1",
    y = "PC2",
    color = "Population"
  ) +
  theme(
    legend.position = "right",
    panel.grid = element_blank()
  )
```


# Pigmentation SNP panel
